constraints: right rotator cuff partial tear — no internal rotation loading right shoulder, no overhead pressing right, no heavy pushing
right lateral epicondylitis (tennis elbow) — avoid gripping with right hand in wrist-extended position, no heavy pronation
preferred_equipment: dumbbells 15-45 lbs (left dominant; right side modified)

machine_settings.Cable Machine: All anchors — right side limited to external rotation patterns only

notes: 48yo retired club tennis player. Right shoulder partial RC tear from serve mechanics — under orthopedic watch, no surgery recommended yet. Chronic right tennis elbow from years of play. Can train lower body fully. Right upper body: no pushing, no gripping under load, external rotation only. Left side: full range. Focus on lower body strength, core, and left-side pulling. Biweekly sessions. Very fit baseline.
